tools.name: get_project_registries
tools.description: Get configured registry names from components.json - Returns error if no components.json exists (use init_project to create one)

tools.name: list_items_in_registries
tools.description: List items from registries (requires components.json - use init_project if missing)

registries.description: Array of registry names to list (e.g., ['@shadcn', '@acme']). Omit to list from every registry configured in components.json.

types.description: Filter by item type. One of: lib, block, component, ui, hook, page, file, theme, style, item, base, font.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (defaults to 100; use 0 for no limit)

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

tools.name: search_items_in_registries
tools.description: Search for components in registries using fuzzy matching (requires components.json). After finding an item, use get_item_examples_from_registries to see usage examples.

registries.description: Array of registry names to search (e.g., ['@shadcn', '@acme']). Omit to search every registry configured in components.json.

query.description: Search query string for fuzzy matching against item names and descriptions

types.description: Filter by item type. One of: lib, block, component, ui, hook, page, file, theme, style, item, base, font.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (defaults to 100; use 0 for no limit)

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

tools.name: view_items_in_registries
tools.description: View detailed information about specific registry items including the name, description, type and files content. For usage examples, use get_item_examples_from_registries instead.

items.description: Array of item names with registry prefix (e.g., ['@shadcn/button', '@shadcn/card'])

tools.name: get_item_examples_from_registries
tools.description: Find usage examples and demos with their complete code. Search for patterns like 'accordion-demo', 'button example', 'card-demo', etc. Returns full implementation code with dependencies.

registries.description: Array of registry names to search (e.g., ['@shadcn', '@acme']). Omit to search every registry configured in components.json.

query.description: Search query for examples (e.g., 'accordion-demo', 'button demo', 'card example', 'tooltip-demo', 'example-booking-form', 'example-hero'). Common patterns: '{item-name}-demo', '{item-name} example', 'example {item-name}'

tools.name: get_add_command_for_items
tools.description: Get the shadcn CLI add command for specific items in a registry. This is useful for adding one or more components to your project.

items.description: Array of items to get the add command for prefixed with the registry name (e.g., ['@shadcn/button', '@shadcn/card'])

tools.name: get_audit_checklist
tools.description: After creating new components or generating new code files, use this tool for a quick checklist to verify that everything is working as expected. Make sure to run the tool after all required steps have been completed.

findings.title: Scope Creep — 'get_project_registries' is named read-only but description implies write access
findings.description: Tool 'get_project_registries' has a read-only prefix but its description mentions write operations ('create'), creating a scope mismatch that callers and LLMs may be unable to detect.
findings.evidence: Get configured registry names from components.json - Returns error if no components.json exists (use init_project to create one)
findings.remediation: Separate read and write operations into distinct tools. Ensure tool names accurately reflect their full capabilities.

findings.title: 'list_items_in_registries' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'search_items_in_registries.query' silently accepts wrong type
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'search_items_in_registries' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'view_items_in_registries' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'get_item_examples_from_registries.query' silently accepts wrong type
findings.remediation: Validate parameter types strictly and return clear JSON-RPC errors on mismatch.

findings.title: 'get_item_examples_from_registries' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: 'get_add_command_for_items' accepts undeclared extra fields
findings.description: Tool accepted arguments containing '__proto__' without error.
findings.remediation: Reject calls containing parameters not declared in inputSchema.

findings.title: initialize accepts protocol version downgrade
findings.description: The server accepted initialize with arbitrary protocol versions: ['9999-99-99', '2030-01-01', '1.0', '2024-01-01', '""', '0.1']. The server also accepted far-future versions, indicating no version validation at all. Servers should reject versions outside their supported range to prevent feature-downgrade attacks.
findings.remediation: Validate protocolVersion against a supported range. Return a JSON-RPC error for versions outside that range.

findings.title: Null request ID accepted — JSON-RPC spec violation
findings.description: The server accepted a request with id=null and returned a result. Per JSON-RPC 2.0, null IDs are reserved for notifications (no response expected). Accepting them may cause response routing bugs in complex orchestration scenarios.
findings.remediation: Reject requests with null id values; treat them as notifications.

findings.title: Protocol crash — string params caused server disconnect
findings.description: Sending a tools/call request where params is a string (not an object) caused the server to crash or disconnect. The JSON-RPC spec requires params to be an array or object.
findings.remediation: Validate params type (must be object or array) before processing. Return -32600 (Invalid Request) for wrong types.

findings.title: MCP server exposes tools with completable arguments
findings.description: 5 tool(s) have schema properties that may support completion/complete enumeration.
findings.remediation: Review which argument values are exposed via completion/complete.
